# Mom's Resin Tables

> Handcrafted resin tables, river tables, and live edge tabletop builds made in Safety Harbor, Florida. Ships nationwide.

Mom's Resin Tables is a small-batch handcraft studio specializing in one-of-one epoxy resin tabletops, live edge river tables, and custom commissions. Every piece is built by hand using reclaimed and premium hardwood species combined with pigmented epoxy resin.

## What We Sell

- Ready-to-ship resin tabletop designs (one-of-one pieces)
- Custom resin table commissions (river tables, live edge slabs, chevron builds)
- Artisan decor sets (sculptural resin-wood panels)

## Key Pages

- Homepage and shop: https://momsresintables.com/
- Shop all products: https://momsresintables.com/shop.html
- Start a custom build: https://momsresintables.com/custom.html
- About the studio: https://momsresintables.com/about.html
- Contact and quotes: https://momsresintables.com/contact.html

## Business Details

- Location: Safety Harbor, Florida 34695 (studio — not a retail storefront)
- Ships nationwide from Safety Harbor, FL
- Phone: (727) 279-5289
- Email: support@momsresintables.com
- Price range: $259–$429 for ready-made tops; custom commissions vary

## Product Categories

- Tabletop Designs — live edge, chevron, mosaic, river panel, and stripe builds in hardwood + resin
- Decor — artisan sculptural resin-wood panel sets
- Custom Commissions — fully custom river tables, live edge slabs, and bespoke builds

## Materials

Reclaimed hardwood species including pine, cedar, white oak, ash, hard maple, hickory, cherry, black walnut, mahogany, teak, padauk, and ebony. Paired with pigmented or clear epoxy resin, hand-sanded, and finished with UV-resistant polyurethane.

## Shipping

Ships nationwide via standard freight. Shipping rates vary by product size band ($18–$74 flat rates). Lead time for ready-made pieces is 3–5 business days.

## Products Available Now — Full Descriptions

All pieces are one-of-one handmade epoxy resin table tops. Once sold, they are gone. Each URL links directly to that product's detail and purchase page.

### Tideforge Top Design — $279
SKU: MRT-001 | Style: Live Edge + Resin | Shipping: $34
Dimensions: approx. 20 in W × 14 in D × 1.5 in H
A compact handmade resin side table top crafted from layered mixed reclaimed hardwood strips with a shoreline-inspired teal and earth-tone epoxy pour. At approximately 20 × 14 inches, this one-of-one piece works as an end table, nightstand surface, or side table accent. The layered pigmented resin creates depth similar to a tide pool captured in gloss — finished in hand-sanded, high-build polyurethane. No two teal epoxy resin wood table tops look the same.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=tideforge-top

### Mosaic Hearth Top Design — $319
SKU: MRT-002 | Style: Patchwork Wood | Shipping: $74
Dimensions: approx. 40 in W × 16 in D × 1.5 in H
A large handcrafted multi-species hardwood tabletop sealed in a deep flood-coat epoxy resin finish. The geometric strip mosaic features contrasting wood species — walnut, maple, and reclaimed hardwoods bound in UV-resistant gloss resin. Ideal as an epoxy coffee table top, entry console top, or statement dining bench surface.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=mosaic-hearth-top

### Chevron Lumen Top Design — $309
SKU: MRT-003 | Style: Geometric Resin | Shipping: $34
Dimensions: approx. 22 in W × 16 in D × 1.5 in H
A handmade mixed hardwood side table top in a classic chevron pattern with clear epoxy resin fill and a glass-like flood coat. Ideal for a small coffee table top, accent table, or nightstand. Built for modern, Scandinavian, and transitional interiors.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=chevron-lumen-top

### Riverline Top Design — $339
SKU: MRT-004 | Style: Live Edge River | Shipping: $34
Dimensions: approx. 23 in W × 16 in D × 1.5 in H
A live edge hardwood slab table top with a flowing teal epoxy river channel. This is a true river table design in a compact side table format — the teal resin river highlights the original slab's grain movement and live edge character. Perfect for coastal, rustic, or modern boho interiors.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=riverline-top

### Atelier Stripe Top Design — $259
SKU: MRT-005 | Style: Modern Stripe | Shipping: $52
Dimensions: approx. 26 in W × 18 in D × 1.5 in H
A low-profile handmade resin table top with alternating strips of mixed reclaimed wood species and a clear epoxy flood coat with hand-buffed shine. Fits a coffee table top, accent table, or shelf display. Great for Scandinavian, mid-century modern, and minimalist interiors.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=atelier-stripe-top

### Longline Mosaic Top Design — $359
SKU: MRT-006 | Style: Long Form | Shipping: $74
Dimensions: approx. 46 in W × 14 in D × 1.5 in H
A wide, elongated handcrafted reclaimed hardwood strip table top sized for a bench top, console table, or long coffee table surface. The mosaic strip layout creates a visual rhythm in green and gold wood tones, protected by a durable resin-coated surface and satin edges.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=longline-mosaic-top

SKU: MRT-007 | Style: Artisan Chevron | Shipping: $34
Dimensions: approx. 23 in W × 16 in D × 1.5 in H
A premium handmade chevron-pattern epoxy resin table top crafted from multiple hardwood species with pigmented resin inlays and a deep high-gloss mirror finish. Bold diagonal composition with maximum contrast between wood tones and resin fills — a statement piece for design-forward homes and modern lofts.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=prism-chevron-top

Dimensions: approx. 34 in W × 22 in D × 1.5 in H
A handcrafted striped hardwood epoxy resin coffee table top at proper coffee table scale (34 × 22 in). Embedded resin stripes and a highly reflective gloss finish pair beautifully with decorative iron or metal table bases. Suits traditional, eclectic, and farmhouse interiors.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=wrought-bloom-top

SKU: MRT-009 | Style: Live Edge River | Shipping: $74
Dimensions: approx. 36 in W × 16 in D × 1.5 in H
A natural live edge slab epoxy resin table top with a translucent aqua channel that follows the organic contours of the original wood slab. Creates a river table effect using translucent teal resin — highlighting grain character and live edge texture. Console table, bench surface, or bold accent table.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=aqua-vein-top

### Artisan River Panel Set — $289 (3-Piece Set)
SKU: MRT-010 | Style: Sculptural Decor | Shipping: $18
Dimensions: Tallest panel approx. 14 in H × 6 in W
A collectible three-piece set of handmade resin-and-wood panels featuring colored epoxy resin channels through mixed hardwood sections with a gloss hand-finished seal. Designed for shelf styling, desk display, bookcase accents, or as a decorative trio on a console table. Each panel showcases the river table aesthetic in miniature.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=artisan-river-panel-set

### Cedar Facet Top Design — $329
SKU: MRT-011 | Style: Sculpted Base | Shipping: $52
Dimensions: approx. 24 in W × 18 in D × 1.5 in H
A handcrafted cedar and reclaimed hardwood coffee table top with a sculptural side profile and warm cedar tones protected under a glassy high-build clear coat with resin reinforcement. Warm, aromatic cedar grain shows beautifully under the clear epoxy resin surface. Great for rustic, cabin, or modern farmhouse interiors.

### Teal River Console Top Design — $389
SKU: MRT-012 | Style: Live Edge Console | Shipping: $74
Dimensions: approx. 44 in W × 15 in D × 1.5 in H
A long-form live edge hardwood slab epoxy resin table top built as a console table, hallway table top, or long accent bench surface. A vibrant teal epoxy river channel runs through the natural live edge slab. Mirror resin coat and hand-smoothed edges give it a gallery-quality finish. Perfect for entryways, studio lofts, behind sofas.
URL: https://momsresintables.com/product.html?id=teal-river-console-top

## Shipping Rates by Product Size

- Decor items (panels, small accent pieces): $18 flat rate
- Side table tops (under 24 in): $34 flat rate
- Coffee / accent table tops (24–30 in): $52 flat rate
- Console / bench tops (30+ in): $74 flat rate
All items ship via standard freight from Safety Harbor, Florida. Transit typically 3–7 business days after the 3–5 day handling window.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Where does Mom's Resin Tables ship to?
A: Nationwide across the United States from Safety Harbor, Florida.

Q: How long does shipping take for epoxy resin table tops?
A: Ready-made pieces ship within 3–5 business days. Transit is typically 3–7 additional days depending on your destination zip code.

Q: What is the price range for handmade resin table tops?
A: Ready-made tabletop designs range from $259 to $429. Custom commissions are quoted individually based on size, materials, and complexity.

Q: Can I order a custom river table or epoxy resin table?
A: Yes. Start a custom build inquiry at https://momsresintables.com/custom.html — configure wood species, resin style, size, base options, and more. Custom lead time is 2–6 weeks after deposit approval.

Q: Are these resin table tops truly one of a kind?
A: Yes. Every piece is one-of-one. Once sold, it cannot be reordered identically. Similar commissions can be done through the custom builder.

Q: What wood species are used in your handmade epoxy tables?
A: Pine, cedar, white oak, ash, hard maple, hickory, cherry, black walnut, mahogany, teak, padauk, and ebony. Wood species are paired with pigmented or clear epoxy resin based on the design.

Q: Are bases included with tabletop orders?
A: No. All ready-made products are table tops only. Any base or frame shown in product photos is for display only and is not included in the listed price. Bases and leg systems are available as custom add-ons.

Q: What is the return policy?
A: Returns are accepted for defective items only. Custom commissions are non-refundable after production begins. Full policy: https://momsresintables.com/refund-policy.html

Q: Where is Mom's Resin Tables studio located?
A: Safety Harbor, Florida 34695. This is a working studio — not a retail storefront. All orders are placed online or via commission inquiry.

Q: Can I visit the studio to see the tables in person?
A: The studio is not open to walk-in visitors. Contact us at support@momsresintables.com or (727) 279-5289 to schedule a viewing by appointment.

Q: What is the difference between a river table and a resin table top?
A: A river table has a live edge wood slab with an epoxy resin "river" channel running between two slab halves or through the natural wood void. A resin table top can use any combination of wood and resin — including chevron, mosaic, stripe, and panel designs that do not follow a river format.

Q: How durable are epoxy resin table tops?
A: The finished surfaces are sealed with a high-build polyurethane top coat over the epoxy resin base — making them scratch-resistant, water-resistant, and easy to clean. Coasters are recommended for heat and condensation.

Q: Do you offer wholesale or trade pricing?
A: Contact us at support@momsresintables.com to discuss trade or wholesale inquiries for interior designers, furniture retailers, or staging companies.

## Policies

- Custom Build Policy: https://momsresintables.com/custom-build-policy.html
- Production Lead Times: https://momsresintables.com/production-lead-times.html
- Refund Policy: https://momsresintables.com/refund-policy.html
- Privacy Policy: https://momsresintables.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://momsresintables.com/terms-of-service.html
